name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR34NoIci
title: Do not routinely add immune checkpoint inhibitors to neoadjuvant chemotherapy
description: Choose neoadjuvant chemotherapy strategy for triple-negative breast cancer.

action.description: Do not routinely add immune checkpoint inhibitors to standard neoadjuvant chemotherapy for early-stage TNBC.

documentation.citation: There is insufficient evidence to recommend routinely adding immune checkpoint inhibitors to neoadjuvant chemotherapy in early-stage TNBC. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 3.4
documentation.label: claim-r3-4

action.title: Do not routinely add immune checkpoint inhibitors to neoadjuvant chemotherapy
